Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Wait in Petri nets places represent states markings and transitions represent activities events The flow should be start place to CR transition to cr completed place to DV transition to dv completed place Actually its common in pm4py to have places between transitions Lets stick to a standard pattern Place to Transition to Place to Transition

Text: Arcs p start to CR CR to p cr p cr to DV DV to p dv p dv to RDS RDS to p dv p dv to FC FC to p fc p fc to II II to p fc p fc to CA CA to p ca p ca to AP AP to p ap p ap to P P to p p p p to N N to p n p n to CL CL to p cl p cl to p end This matches Petri net conventions

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: One minor point The prompt says must be approved by a senior manager if the amount surpasses a certain threshold For simplicity in a Petri net we can model this as a direct flow CA to AP to P or optionally add a condition branch Given the prompts focus a direct flow CA to AP to P is acceptable

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The prompt says if documents are incomplete after Document Verification DV a re submission of documents step occurs Re Document Submission RDS before the process continues This implies a choice branch from DV In Petri nets this is naturally handled by having arcs from p dv to both t rds and t fc The token will go to one or the other based on execution logic This is correct Similarly for FC to II to FC loop
